user_input: Gib Umin und Umax für alle Busse in PF zurück.

decision_trace.planner_reasoning: The user requests Umin and Umax values for all buses in PowerFactory. This requires first listing all bus objects (using pf.load_catalog) and then querying the specific voltage limit attributes (Umin/Umax) for each bus (using pf.query_element_data). No standard workflow exists for this combined operation, necessitating a custom plan.

result.answer: Tool existiert nicht in der UnifiedToolRegistry: pf.load_catalog

planner_decision.reasoning: The user requests Umin and Umax values for all buses in PowerFactory. This requires first listing all bus objects (using pf.load_catalog) and then querying the specific voltage limit attributes (Umin/Umax) for each bus (using pf.query_element_data). No standard workflow exists for this combined operation, necessitating a custom plan.
